extract.name: Shift U Pricing
extract.tagline: Every offer, one page, in CAD.
extract.summary: Shift U's pricing page lists two categories: done-for-you services (landing pages, full websites, Google and Meta ads, AI chat agents, voice agents, and a full conversion system) and AI training programs (Operator Certification, Private Team Training, and Workforce Transformation). Each offer carries fixed scope, a written guarantee, and a stated turnaround time. Prices range from $350 one-time for a landing page up to a $55,000 flat engagement for Workforce Transformation.
extract.pricing: SERVICES: Landing Pages from $350 (one-time). Full Website from $800 (quoted by scope). Google and Meta Ads $300 per month, plus ad spend. AI Chat Agent $150 to $250 per month. Voice Agent per seat (quoted by call volume). Conversion System quoted (site plus CRM plus attribution). PROGRAMS: AI Operator Certification $7,500 per seat. Private Team Training $22,500 flat program fee (Most picked). Workforce Transformation $55,000 flat engagement.

extract.capgRemoved: Removed all Canada-Alberta Job Grant (CAJG) and funding content. Specifically stripped: the page's two-category framing of "Services (Not Grant Eligible)" vs "Programs (CAJG Eligible)" and the per-service "not grant eligible" labels; the per-program "Net after CAJG" prices and "Grant covers" amounts (AI Operator Certification net $2,550 / grant covers $4,950; Private Team Training net $7,650 / grant covers $14,850; Workforce Transformation net $18,700 / grant covers $36,300); the statements "The Canada-Alberta Job Grant covers up to 66 percent of AI training, with up to $10,000 per trainee per year", "Up to 66 percent funded, up to $10,000 per trainee per year, through 2028", "66% CAJG covers Of eligible training costs for Alberta employers, funded through 2028", "$10,000 Per trainee cap Maximum funded per trainee per year", and "CAJG covers up to 66 percent of eligible training costs, up to $10,000 per trainee per year, funded through 2028. The sticker price stays on the invoice, the grant reimburses the qualifying portion after Adam files the paperwork. The net column you see beside every program is the real out-of-pocket once funding lands"; the "CAJG paperwork handled by Adam" benefit; the entire "Alberta Options" comparison table (Shift U vs NorQuest/Bow Valley/MacEwan vs Big-4 Consultancy vs Self-paced, including the "CAJG up to 66% funding" row, "On-site Alberta delivery" row, and "Net after CAJG" price rows); the grant calculator disclaimer about eligibility, claim amount, reimbursement timing and Alberta Labour approval; and three grant-related FAQ questions ("How does the Canada-Alberta Job Grant change the price I actually pay?", "Which Shift U offers are CAJG eligible and which are not?", and the FAQ answer about CAJG covering up to 66 percent). Kept the underlying services, programs, their sticker/list prices, scope, guarantees, and turnaround times.

copy.seoDescription: Clear pricing for websites, WhatsApp AI agents, and automations. Monthly plan or one-time build. No big upfront, cancel anytime.

sections.headline: Pick what fits, no surprises
sections.subhead: Every option is listed below with real numbers. No call required just to see what things cost.
sections.body: Website plus the AI behind it, under one roof. Start small or go all in. You keep the support after launch either way.
sections.flags: All prices below are [REVIEW] placeholders. Confirm final numbers before publishing.

sections.headline: Your site, handled monthly
sections.subhead: Design, hosting, domain, updates, and support in one monthly fee. No big upfront. Cancel anytime.
sections.body: Most owners pick Pro. It covers the pages you actually need plus monthly changes, so the site never goes stale.
bullets: Starter: [REVIEW: $X/mo], up to 3 pages, hosting, domain, SSL included
Starter: 1 content update request per month
Starter: contact form plus basic SEO setup
Starter: email support, 2 business day response
Pro (Most popular): [REVIEW: $X/mo], up to 7 pages, everything in Starter
Pro: unlimited small updates, monthly performance check
Pro: lead capture plus Google Business and analytics setup
Pro: priority support, same day response
Scale: [REVIEW: $X/mo], up to 15 pages, everything in Pro
Scale: WhatsApp AI agent included, booking and lead routing
Scale: A/B testing plus monthly growth report
Scale: dedicated contact, fastest turnaround
sections.flags: Middle tier (Pro) marked Most popular for decoy hierarchy. All three monthly prices are [REVIEW: $X/mo]. Page counts are suggested defaults, confirm before publishing.

sections.headline: Own it outright, pay once
sections.subhead: Want to own the site and handle it yourself? We build it, hand over the files, done.
bullets: Landing page: [REVIEW: $X], single high-converting page, ready to launch
Business site: [REVIEW: $X], up to 5 pages, full structure and SEO
Custom build: [REVIEW: $X], larger sites, quoted after a quick call
Every build includes mobile design, fast load, and handover
sections.body: One-time payment, the code is yours. Add a maintenance plan later if you want us to keep it current.

sections.headline: Answers and books while you sleep
sections.subhead: A 24/7 assistant that replies, qualifies leads, and books appointments in your customer's language.
sections.body: One-time setup to train it on your business. Then a flat monthly fee to run and maintain it.
bullets: Setup: [REVIEW: $X] one-time, built and trained on your services
Monthly: [REVIEW: $X/mo], hosting, updates, and tuning included
Handles FAQs, lead qualifying, and appointment booking
Replies in the customer's language, day or night
sections.flags: Setup [REVIEW: $X] and monthly [REVIEW: $X/mo] both placeholders. Proof anchor (hundreds of conversations/month) lives on home/services, exact number is [PLACEHOLDER].

sections.headline: Kill the manual work for good
sections.subhead: We connect your tools so leads, follow-ups, and data move on their own. No more copy-paste between apps.
sections.body: Most setups are a one-time project. Add a retainer if you want ongoing changes and monitoring.
bullets: Project: from [REVIEW: $X], scoped after a short call
Retainer: [REVIEW: $X/mo], changes, monitoring, and new workflows
Connects CRM, forms, email, calendar, and WhatsApp
Common wins: auto follow-ups, lead routing, no double entry
sections.flags: Project starting price [REVIEW: $X] and retainer [REVIEW: $X/mo] both placeholders.

sections.headline: Subscription or buy it once
sections.body: Subscription if you want low upfront cost and us handling it forever. One-shot if you want to own the build and run it yourself.

sections.headline: The money questions, answered
bullets: How does billing work? Monthly plans bill on the same date each month. One-shot builds are paid up front or in two parts.
Can I cancel anytime? Yes. Website-as-a-Service has no lock-in. Cancel and your site stays live through the paid period.
Do I own my website? On one-shot builds, yes, the code is yours. On subscription, the site stays with the plan while it runs.
What if I start monthly and want to buy it out? You can switch to a one-shot buyout later. We credit part of what you have paid.
sections.flags: Buyout credit terms are illustrative. [REVIEW] the exact buyout and credit policy before publishing.

sections.headline: Tell us the goal, get a number
sections.subhead: One short call. We recommend the option that fits your budget and what you actually need, not the biggest invoice.
sections.flags: Secondary action 'See our work' available site-wide.
